functional_requirements.description: User can create an account using email and password.

validations.description: Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.

risks.description: No password complexity rules beyond minimum length, which may lead to weak passwords.
No email format validation specified, which could allow invalid email addresses.

missing_information: Email format validation rules (e.g., must contain '@' and domain).
Password complexity requirements (e.g., uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special characters).
Confirmation of password (e.g., re-enter password field).
Account verification process (e.g., email verification link).
Error handling and user feedback for duplicate email or invalid password.
Session management after account creation (e.g., auto-login).

requirement_items.description: User can create an account using email and password.
Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.
